text:
GNU Midnight Commander 4.6.1
Shell link work is good when i go to the remote mashine with root on MD disk.

GNU Midnight Commander 4.7.2
Shell link work is bad when i go to the remote mashine with root on MD disk.
I do not go into the any one dir or symlink on the remote mashine.

It is bug or feature ?
